name: kicad
description: Local Claude Code plugin that lets Claude read, understand, and REVIEW KiCad 9/10 schematics and PCBs. Wraps kicad-cli (ERC/DRC/netlist/render) plus a deterministic engineering-check engine (IPC-2221 trace sizing, decoupling, net-class audit, schematic/board parity, DFM, BOM), then renders schematic/board/3D images for Claude to read and a datasheet-grounded review. Read-only in v0 (no design-file edits). Forked from lamaalrajih/kicad-mcp (MIT).
